servinfo.title: Engine Oil and Filter Change

attention2.ptxt: There is an increased risk of severe personal injury or health problems if the procedure described below is performed without taking proper precautions.

item.ptxt: Engine oil has an adverse health effect. Be sure to read and understand the instructions in General Precautions and follow all the instructions.
Confirm that the engine is not running when performing Steps 1) – 7) of the procedure.
Be sure to adequately ventilate the working area when starting the engine in Step 8).

servinfo.ptxt: Before draining engine oil, check engine for oil leakage.
If any evidence of leakage is found, correct defective part before proceeding to the following procedure.

s1.ptxt: Drain engine oil by removing drain plug (1).
After draining oil, wipe drain plug clean.
Replace gasket with new one and apply engine oil to drain plug.
Reinstall drain plug and tighten it to specified torque.
Loosen oil filter using special tool and remove oil filter.
Wipe clean oil filter mounting surface on oil filter adapter case.
Apply engine oil to new oil filter gasket.
Install the oil filter in the following procedure.

s2.ptxt: Fit the oil filter (1) with the oil filter adapter case, and then tighten it to the specified torque using the special tool.
Tighten the oil filter (1) by hand until its gasket touches the oil filter adapter case.
Using the special tool, rotate the oil filter three-quarters of one turn (2) to tighten it.

s1.ptxt: Replenish oil until oil level is brought to FULL level mark (hole) on oil level gauge (oil pan and oil filter capacity). Oil filler port is at top of cylinder head cover. It is recommended to use engine oil of SG, SH, SJ, SL or SM grade. Select appropriate oil viscosity according to engine oil viscosity chart [A] below.
SAE 0W-20 oil is the best choice for good fuel economy and good starting in cold weather.

item.ptxt: Engine oil capacity is as specified below.
However, note that actual amount of oil required during oil change may somewhat differ from that indicated below depending on such factors as temperature, viscosity, etc.
Engine oil specification and viscosity chart [A] indicated in this manual are typical ones.
For the specific information on the engine oil and proper engine oil viscosity, refer to “Engine Oil and Filter” section of the Owner's Manual.

s1.ptxt: Start engine and run it for 5 minutes. Stop it and wait another 5 minutes before checking oil level. Add oil, if necessary, to bring oil level to FULL level mark (hole) (1) on oil level gauge.
Check oil filter and drain plug for oil leakage.
